title: Karnataka CM News Highlights: DK Shivakumar meets Guv to stake claim to form new govt in state; oath ceremony on 3 June
description: Karnataka CM News Highlights: Karnataka Congress president DK Shivakumar has been elected state CLP leader. He confirmed oath ceremony on 3rd June. DK Shivakumar met Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot to stake claim to form a new government in state.
